title: cyperus iria f. chrysomelinus
intro: Cyperus iria f. chrysomelinus, also known as Golden Cyperus or Golden Papyrus Sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family, characterized by its golden-yellow flowers and long, flat stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus iria f. chrysomelinus include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
